top.title: After Iran talks falter, the big question is 'what happens next?'
top.summary: Twenty-one hours was not enough to end 47 years of hostility between Iran and the US, writes the BBC's Lyse Doucet.

top.title: Asha Bhosle: The sound of Bollywood dies aged 92
